Name: departments
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($3::uuid[])) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files"."files" AS "files") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.files"), '[]') AS "files" FROM (WITH "_root.r.files.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" f WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = f."id" AND f."bucket_id" = $4 AND (f."uploaded_by_user_id" = $5::uuid OR f."bucket_id" = $6)) AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" AND ("public"."department_files"."department_id" = ANY($7::uuid[]) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" g WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = g."id" AND g."uploaded_by_user_id" = $8::uuid))) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.file"."file" AS "file", "_root.r.files.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.files" FROM "_root.r.files.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.files.r.file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."files" WHERE "_root.r.files.base"."file_id" = "id" AND ("storage"."files"."uploaded_by_user_id" = $9::uuid OR "storage"."files"."bucket_id" = $10) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.file.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "file" FROM "_root.r.files.r.file.base") AS "_root.r.files.r.file" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.files.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.r.files.base"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($11::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.files.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.files.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.files") AS "_root.r.files" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
